use_cases: Displaying status labels like 'new', 'sale', or 'featured' on product or content cards
Showing category or tag labels in content management and e-commerce interfaces
Indicating feature availability or plan tiers in pricing tables
Marking notification counts or unread states in dashboard interfaces
Labeling content types such as articles, videos, or documents in media platforms
ai_summary: A reusable badge component with variant-driven styling using class-variance-authority. Supports multiple visual variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) with hover and focus states. Used for displaying status labels, tags, and category indicators across various interface contexts.
